nasb.text: Anyone who rebels against your command and does not obey your words in all that you command him, shall be put to death; only be strong and courageous.”

esv.text: Whoever rebels against your commandment and disobeys your words, whatever you command him, shall be put to death. Only be strong and courageous.”

cnv.text: 無論誰違背你的話，不聽從你吩咐他的一切命令，那人必要處死。你只管堅強勇敢。”

ccb.text: 任何人违抗你的命令，不照你的吩咐去做，都要被处死。你要刚强勇敢！”
